reviewer_notes: All referenced APIs (player.muted, player.setMuted) exist and work as described.
The analyser pipeline is confirmed as source→AnalyserNode→GainNode→destination, so AC4 (analysis continues while muted) is structurally guaranteed.
The infoOverlay.ts pattern is a valid reference for the toggle's DOM approach.
main.ts audioPromise.then() callback is the correct integration point.
Vitest with jsdom is already configured; test plan is consistent with existing test files.
Style plan correctly mirrors .eavi-info-btn positioning and sizing conventions.
suggestions: Prefer simple text labels ('Mute'/'Unmute') or inline SVG over emoji to avoid the cross-platform rendering risk the plan already identifies.
Consider using border-radius: 50% to match the circular shape of .eavi-info-btn — the plan says 'border-radius' generically but should be explicit.
verdict: Plan is accurate, complete, and safe to implement as written.
